principle: Do not equate valid JSON, recognized containers, source-lane presence, or UI availability with trusted biblical text.

notes: Currently named canonical NT defects are repaired or overlay-represented without main-row insertion.
This does not assert a fresh full scholarly collation of every NT verse.

reasons: NABRE OT alignment and versification defects remain unresolved.
Daniel and related Greek-extension handling require source/versification decisions.
Minor-prophet and chapter-boundary issues require bounded inspection before patching.
Psalms use a legacy root-array subsystem.
Psalms require separate architecture before normalization or trust claims.
Psalms are governed but remain not textually trusted.
psalms.reason: Governed 155-record legacy psalter array; text/provenance/label adjudication still pending.
